title: GST/HST rebate – GST/HST break - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – GST/HST break
Form GST189 – Reason code 1C
Reason code 1C provides a rebate for amounts paid in error (subsection 261(1)) of the Excise Tax Act .
The GST/HST break was in effect from December 14, 2024 , to February 15, 2025 , and gave a tax break on many everyday essentials. During this period, retailers or suppliers should not have charged you the GST/HST when purchasing qualifying items.
Learn more about the GST/HST break and qualifying items: GST/HST break .

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
